fields.label: Full name
fields.hint: As it appears on your ID.

variants.name: Stacked
variants.description: Default layout — label sits above the control.

variants.name: Inline
variants.description: Label beside the control. Responsive: stacks on mobile (<sm breakpoint).

sizes.description: Compact — suitable for toolbar or inline edit forms.
Spacious — suitable for onboarding or checkout flows.

loading.description: Form is aria-busy. Controls should be disabled via Fieldset disabled prop.

fields.label: Email
fields.error: Please enter a valid email address.

fields.label: Password
fields.error: Password must be at least 8 characters.

disabled.description: Wrap fields in <Fieldset disabled> to propagate disabled state to all controls natively.

edge_cases.long_label: Subscription and billing address information — primary account holder
edge_cases.long_error: The value you entered does not meet the complexity requirements: must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
edge_cases.long_hint: This email will be used as your login and for account recovery. Use an email address you have regular access to.
edge_cases.all_fields_error: State where every field in the form has a validation error simultaneously.
edge_cases.single_field: Form with only one field and one submit button — minimal usage.

no_actions_separator.description: Actions row without separator border — for compact forms.

actions_align_start.description: Left-aligned submit button — uncommon but valid for RTL or branded layouts.

actions_align_between.description: Secondary action on left, primary on right — useful for multi-step forms with Back/Next.
